stemHtml: Which of the following options best describes the seasonal weather in Hong Kong (22°N,114°E) in the Far East?

options.a: Mild and dry SW monsoon during the winter; hot and moist NE monsoon during the summer.
options.b: Mild and dry NE monsoon during the winter; hot and moist SW monsoon during the summer.
options.c: Hot and moist NW monsoon during the winter; mild and dry SE monsoon during the summer.
options.d: Hot and moist NE monsoon during the winter; mild and dry SW monsoon during the summer.
